content: Tavily is a set of APIs built for AI agents, centered on web search and data extraction for workflows like RAG. It offers three main APIs: Search (AI-focused search with scraping and optional LLM-generated responses), Extract (scrape up to 20 URLs per call), and Crawl (map and crawl domains). Key features of the Search API include customizable search depth and domains, full-page content extraction, real-time results, easy integration (Python, JS, LangChain, LlamaIndex), and enterprise-grade security (SOC 2, zero data retention, scalability). Pricing includes a Free tier (1,000 credits/month), Pay-as-you-go at $0.008/credit, monthly plans at $0.0075–$0.005/credit, and custom enterprise pricing, with pro-rated upgrades and downgrades applied at the next billing cycle.
